/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:GABE PODESTA, CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF DA PAUL BRENNAN/X:ATTORNEY ANDREW MORRISON ALONG WITH CONFLICT ATTORNEY MAITREYA BADAMI/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER RYAN JONES/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1,8 X 11 MANILA ENVELOPE; PEOPLE'S 1A, PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING A TARLIKE SUBSTANCE LABELED E1; PEOPLE'S 1B, PLASTIC BAGGIE CONTAINING WHITE SUBSTANCE LABELED E2; PEOPLE;S 1C, PLASTIC BAGGIES CONTAINING 5 PILLS LABELEDE3; AND PEOPLE;S 1D, SFPD NARCOTICS ANALYSIS REPORT (TASHA SMITH)/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1,2/BAIL:75000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/

/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUT DOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:07-27-09/CONTD:FOR E R P IN DEPT23/       /CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
